config.title: Tree services
config.script:
'----------------------- 'todo: '2.obsługa "more" - wczytywanie kawałkami '4.%child_table% jest chore '-----------------------
#define PSEUDO_TYPEID_FIXED_LAST 0
#define CPRDINX_PARENT_TYPEID 0 #define CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID 1 #define CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT 2 #define CPRDINX_FIXED_FUNCTION 2 #define CPRDINX_LIST_FIELDNAME 3 #define CPRDINX_CHILD_2_PARENT 3 #define CPRDINX_FIXED_SIMPLE_TEXT 3 #define CPRDINX_CHILD_FILTER 4 #define CPRDINX_FIXED_SIMPLE_HLI 4 #define CPRDINX_CHILD_MERGE 5
dim global dim intpoziom:intpoziom=0 dim flaga dim intIlosc
const MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS = 8 '======================================================================= ' DATA RETRIEVIAL ' funkcje mają prefix tsd_ (tree services data) '=======================================================================
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- ' zwraca zapytanie SQL z listą 'dzieci' danego węzła ' postaci: ' c_typeid, c_idobj, c_subnodes '(typeid+idobj dziecka) oraz info czy dziecko ma dzieci 'bFolders - zwraca zapytanie pokazujące możliwe 'dzieci-kontenery' albo 'dzieci-liście' '----------------------------------------------------------------------- function tsd_get_children_query(byref pTreeDef,byref nResultSetNr,byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,byref pfFixedItem,byref pFixedCPRD) 'as String
dim strSQL : strSQL = "" set pfFixedItem = nothing set pFixedCPRD = nothing
#ifdef _SECURITY dim strSortZadanie : strSortZAdanie = "" #endif
'pętla dla wszystkich możliwych typów dzieci (najczęściej 1) do while true
'pobierz informacje strukturalną 'pCPRD - child parent relation description (navo_array)
dim pCPRDChilds set pCPRDChilds = pTreeDef.get_relation(nParentTypeId,nParentIdObj,nResultSetNr)
if pCPRDChilds is nothing then exit do end if
dim nChildTypeId : nChildTypeId = pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID) if nChildTypeId <= PSEUDO_TYPEID_FIXED_LAST then set pfFixedItem = pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_FIXED_FUNCTION) set pFixedCPRD = pCPRDChilds exit do else dim strSQLSubNodes : strSQLSubNodes = tsd_get_grandchild_query(pTreeDef,nChildTypeId) dim strChild2Parent : strChild2Parent = pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_2_PARENT)
'empty child2parent means all! if strChild2Parent = "" then strChild2Parent = "(1=1)" else strChild2Parent = "c." + strChild2Parent + "=" + cstr(nParentIdObj) end if
#ifdef _SECURITY 'zmiana sortowania dla tabeli dzialania na karcie klienta if pCPRDChilds.Value(1)=10119 then
pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT) = "dDataRozp " strSortZAdanie = "dDataRozp" end if #endif
dim strSQLPart strSQLPart = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("select 'c_typeid'=%1,'c_idobj'=c.idobj,'c_subnodes'=%2,'c_sort'=%3 " +_ "from %4 as c where %5 and %6 ") _ (nChildTypeId) _ (strSQLSubNodes) _ (pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT)) _ (doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef( nChildTypeId ).tablename) _ (strChild2Parent) _ (replace(pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_FILTER),"%child_table%","c")) _ .Done()
if strSQL <> "" then strSQL = strSQL + "union all " end if
strSQL = strSQL + strSQLPart
if not pCPRDChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_MERGE) then exit do end if end if loop
if strSQL <> "" then strSQL = strSQL + " order by c_sort" end if
#ifdef _SECURITY if strSortZAdanie = "dDataRozp" then strSQL = strSQL + " desc " end if #endif
'-- puste oznacza nie otwieraj query - błąd definicji tsd_get_children_query = strSQL end function
'---- zbierz wszystkie możliwe grand children --- private function tsd_get_grandchild_query(byref pTreeDef,byval nChildTypeId)
dim strSQLExistsGC : strSQLExistsGC = "" dim nSubPart : nSubPart = 0 dim pCPRDGrandChilds : set pCPRDGrandChilds = nothing
'---- czy dzieci mają dzieci do while true
set pCPRDGrandChilds = pTreeDef.get_relation(nChildTypeId,0,nSubPart) if pCPRDGrandChilds is nothing then 'nie ma więcej exit do end if if pCPRDGrandChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID) > PSEUDO_TYPEID_FIXED_LAST then if strSQLExistsGC <> "" then strSQLExistsGC = strSQLExistsGC + " or " end if
strSQLExistsGC = strSQLExistsGC + doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "exists(select * from %1 as gc where gc.%2=c.idobj and %3)") _ (doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pCPRDGrandChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID) ).tablename) _ (pCPRDGrandChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_2_PARENT)) _ (replace(pCPRDGrandChilds.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_FILTER),"%child_table%","gc")) _ .Done() else 'jeśli ma pseudo typ to powoduje to że obiekt jest folderem tsd_get_grandchild_query = "1" exit function end if loop
'dostosuj do postaci strawnej dla zapytania if strSQLExistsGC <> "" then strSQLExistsGC = "case when " + strSQLExistsGC + " then 1 else 0 end " else strSQLExistsGC = "0" end if
tsd_get_grandchild_query = strSQLExistsGC end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'funkcja czyta dzieci podanego ojca (nParentTypeId,nParentIdObj) 'poczynając od nStartRecordNr rekordu 'i informuje o tym Presentation Builder '----------------------------------------------------------------------- sub tsd_read_children(byref pTreeDef,byref pTSPB, byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,byval nStartRecordNr,byval pprzycisk) dim opcja1
#ifdef _FRAM if pPrzycisk=0 then if nStartRecordNr=1 then nStartRecordNr=0 pPrzycisk=1 opcja1=1 intpoziom=1 flaga=true else pPrzycisk=0 opcja1=0 end if else pPrzycisk=1 opcja1=1 end if #endif
'-------- iteruj się po wszystkich resultsetach dim nResultSetNr : nResultSetNr = 0 dim pfFixedItem dim pFixedCPRD
dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = nothing dim nReadCounter : nReadCounter = 0
do while true set pfFixedItem = nothing set pFixedCPRD = nothing
dim strSQLQuery : strSQLQuery = tsd_get_children_query(pTreeDef,nResultSetNr,nParentTypeId,nParentIdObj,pfFixedItem,pFixedCPRD)
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL 'tylko dla działań if InStr(strSQLQuery,"'c_typeid'=10119") > 0 then dim strTop: strTop = "select top 10 'c_typeid'" if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 8 then strTop = "select top 9999 'c_typeid'" end if end if strSQLQuery = Replace(strSQLQuery,"select 'c_typeid'",strTop) strSQLQuery = Replace(strSQLQuery,"order by c_sort","order by c_sort desc") end if #endif
if strSQLQuery = "" and pfFixedItem is nothing then 'error or no more resultsets exit do end if if strSQLQuery <> "" then '-- read from resultset dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors(strSQLQuery)
'- próbujemy (oczekiwane exception) if nStartRecordNr > 0 then on error resume next pCursor.Move nStartRecordNr on error goto 0 end if
do while not pCursor.EOF '------ get data from recordset ------ dim nChildTypeId dim nChildIdObj dim bGrandChildren
nChildTypeId = clng(pCursor(0)) nChildIdObj = clng(pCursor(1)) bGrandChildren = (clng(pCursor(2)) = 1) if bGrandChildren then if not flaga then intpoziom=intpoziom+1 end if flaga=true else if flaga then intilosc=pcursor.recordcount-1 flaga=false intpoziom=intpoziom-1 else intilosc=intilosc-1 end if
if intilosc<0 then if intpoziom<>1 then intpoziom=1 end if 'flaga=true end if end if if (nStartRecordNr=0 and intpoziom <> 0 and opcja1=1) then pPrzycisk=1 ' intpoziom=intpoziom+1 end if
'------ process data ---- if not pTSPB.on_next_rs_child(nChildTypeId,nChildIdObj,bGrandChildren,pPrzycisk) then exit do end if
pCursor.MoveNext nReadCounter = nReadCounter + 1 if nReadCounter > 150 and pPerforming is nothing then set pPerforming=doc_.performing("Trwa wczytywanie") end if
if pprzycisk=1 and nChildTypeId=10146 then tsd_read_children pTreeDef,pTSPB,nChildTypeId,nChildIdObj,nStartRecordNr,1 'intpoziom=intpoziom+1 end if loop end if if not pfFixedItem is nothing then if not pTSPB.on_next_fixed_child(nParentTypeId,nParentIdObj,pfFixedItem,pFixedCPRD) then exit do end if end if loop end sub
'======================================================================= ' PRESENTATION BUILDER ' presentation builder można zastąpić całkowicie innym !! '======================================================================= class cstock_tspb private m_nIndent 'as long private m_pDestTable 'as Object private m_idAfter 'as long private m_pPicIdModule 'as object private m_idTreeDef 'as long private m_nBodyExtraCols'as long
private sub class_initialize() set m_pPicIdModule = doc_.getmodule(60301) '- cached for performance m_nBodyExtraCols = 0 end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pPicIdModule = nothing end sub
'----------------------------------------------------------- public property get extracols() extracols = m_nBodyExtraCols end property public property let extracols(nExtraCols) m_nBodyExtraCols = nExtraCols end property '----------------------------------------------------------- public sub init(byval nIndent,byref pDestTable,byval idAfter,byval idTreeDef) m_nIndent = nIndent set m_pDestTable = pDestTable m_idAfter = idAfter m_idTreeDef = idTreeDef end sub
public function create_row() dim pRow : set pRow = m_pDestTable.body.insertnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,m_idAfter,-1) set pRow.userprop=doc_.createhli() pRow.userprop.prop(1) = CLng(m_nIndent)
m_idAfter = pRow.ident set create_row = pRow end function
public sub build_indent(byref pRow,byval bChildren,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval opcja) 'OVERWRITABLE '-- utwórz 1-szą kolumną na wcięcie dim nFirstInd : nFirstInd = m_nIndent if not bChildren then nFirstInd = nFirstInd + 1 end if
do while nFirstInd > 0 dim pCell : set pCell = pRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) with pCell .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE .addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = " " end with nFirstInd = nFirstInd - 1 loop if bChildren then
#ifdef _FRAM if nTypeId = 10146 then if opcja=0 and m_nIndent=0 then set pCell = pRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) pCell.width = MINIMIZE_SIZE
dim pPicturePlus1 : set pPicturePlus1 = pCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) with pPicturePlus1 .image = clng(80202) .width = 150 .height = 150 .tip = "Rozwiń wszystko" set .hli = doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "varFunctionHLI='tsrs_expcol_hli' varTypeId=%1 varObject=%2 vn1=%3") _ (nTypeId)(nIdObj)(m_idTreeDef).Done()) end with end if if opcja=1 then
doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "varFunctionHLI='tsrs_expcol_hli' varTypeId=%1 varObject=%2 vn1=%3") _ (nTypeId)(nIdObj)(m_idTreeDef).Done()) 'tsd_read_children m_idTreeDef,pPB,nTypeId,nIdObj,0 end if end if #endif
if opcja=0 then
set pCell = pRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) pCell.width = MINIMIZE_SIZE dim pPicturePlus : set pPicturePlus = pCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) with pPicturePlus .image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS) .tip = "Rozwiń" set .hli = doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "varFunctionHLI='tsrs_expcol_hli' varTypeId=%1 varObject=%2 vn1=%3") _ (nTypeId)(nIdObj)(m_idTreeDef).Done()) end with end if end if end sub
public function create_arena(byref pRow,byref dzieci,byref opcja,byref nTypeId)
dim pCell : set pCell = pRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) #ifdef _FRAM if nTypeId = 10146 then if m_nIndent<>0 then if opcja then if dzieci then pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent+3 else pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent+2 end if else if dzieci then pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent+2 else pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent+2 end if end if else pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent+1 end if else pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent end if #else pCell.colspan = MAX_EXPLORER_LEVELS - m_nIndent #endif set create_arena = pCell dim nExtra : nExtra = m_nBodyExtraCols do while nExtra > 0 pRow.addnew CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1 nExtra = nExtra -1 loop end function
public function prepare_arena(byval bCointainer,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval opcja)
dim pRow : set pRow = create_row() build_indent pRow, bCointainer, nTypeId,nIdObj,opcja set prepare_arena = create_arena(pRow,bCointainer,opcja,nTypeId) end function
public sub internal_build_body_ex(byref pCell,byref pDataObject, _ byval bPicture, byval bText, _ byref strCustomFunction,byref pCustomHLI)
dim nTypeId : nTypeId = pDataObject.type dim nIdObj : nIdObj = pDataObject.idobj
'---- obrazek dla danego obiektu if bPicture then dim pPicture : set pPicture = pCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) with pPicture .width=Clng( SIZE_FOR_LIST ) .height=CLng( SIZE_FOR_LIST ) .image = m_pPicIdModule.get_obj_pic_id(nTypeId,nIdObj, PICUSE_LISTELEM) end with end if
'------ text------- if bText then dim pHyperLink if not pCustomHLI is nothing then set pHyperLink = pCustomHLI else if strCustomFunction <> "" then set pHyperLink = doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter(strCustomFunction) _ (nTypeId)(nIdObj).Done()) else set pHyperLink = doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(%1,%2,USAGE_VIEW)") _ (nTypeId)(nIdObj).Done()) end if end if
dim pStaticEx : set pStaticEx = pCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1) with pStaticEx .text = pDataObject.text if (not pDataObject.getobjdef.child) then .tip = "Pokaż szczegóły" set .hli = pHyperLink .ignoresysdisable true end if end with end if end sub
public sub build_body(byref pCell,byref pDataObject) 'OVERWRITABLE internal_build_body_ex pCell,pDataObject,true,true,"",nothing end sub
public sub build_extra_cols(byref pFirstExtraCell,byref pDataObject) 'OVERWRITABLE end sub
public sub remove_children(byref pRow) 'do not use members m_ !! object not initialized ! dim nIndent : nIndent = pRow.userprop.prop(1) dim pNextRow : set pNextRow = pRow.nextelement dim pLastRow : set pLastRow = nothing do while not pNextRow is nothing if pNextRow.userprop.prop(1) <= nIndent then exit do end if set pLastRow = pNextRow set pNextRow = pNextRow.nextelement loop if not pLastRow is nothing then dim pSection : set pSection = pRow.parent set pNextRow = pRow.nextelement do while true 'for debug: pNextRow.cell(1).backcolor = rgb(255,0,0) pSection.remove pNextRow if pNextRow is pLastRow then exit do end if set pNextRow = pNextRow.nextelement loop end if end sub
'przetwarza kolejne dziecko z bazy. zwraca false gdy nie chce więcej dzieci ! public function on_next_rs_child(byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval bGranChildren,byval opcja) 'OVERWRITABLE 'build item
dim pBodyCell : set pBodyCell = prepare_arena(bGranChildren, nTypeId,nIdObj,opcja) dim pDataObject : set pDataObject = trans_.getobj(nTypeId,nIdObj) build_body pBodyCell,pDataObject if m_nBodyExtraCols <> 0 then build_extra_cols pBodyCell.nextelement,pDataObject end if on_next_rs_child = true end function 'przetwarza kolejne dziecko fixed public function on_next_fixed_child(byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,byref pfFixedItem,byref pFixedCPRD) on_next_fixed_child = pfFixedItem(Me, nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,pFixedCPRD) end function end class
'======================================================================= class ccustombody_tspb private m_pStockTSPB
'-- customizers in order of use private m_pCustomBodyBuilder private m_pCustomHLIBuilder private m_strCustomFunction 'custom function to insert instead of standard one (OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE) private m_pCustomExtraBuilder
private sub class_initialize() set m_pStockTSPB = new_stock_pb() m_strCustomFunction = "" set m_pCustomHLIBuilder = nothing set m_pCustomBodyBuilder= nothing set m_pCustomExtraBuilder=nothing end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pStockTSPB = nothing end sub '----------------------------------- ' special initialization '----------------------------------- public sub set_body_builder(byref pCustomBodyBuilder) set m_pCustomBodyBuilder = pCustomBodyBuilder end sub public sub set_extra_builder(byref pCustomExtraBuilder) set m_pCustomExtraBuilder = pCustomExtraBuilder end sub public sub set_hli_builder(byref pCustomHLIBuilder) set m_pCustomHLIBuilder = pCustomHLIBuilder end sub public sub set_hli_function(byval strCustomFunction) m_strCustomFunction = strCustomFunction end sub '----------------------------------------------------------- public property get extracols() 'delegate to base class extracols = m_pStockTSPB.extracols end property public property let extracols(nExtraCols) 'delegate to base class m_pStockTSPB.extracols = nExtraCols end property '-----------------------------------
public sub init(byval nIndent,byref pDestTable,byval idAfter,byval idTreeDef) 'delegate to base class m_pStockTSPB.init nIndent,pDestTable,idAfter,idTreeDef end sub
public function create_row() 'delegate to base class set create_row = m_pStockTSPB.create_row() end function
public sub build_indent(byref pRow,byval bChildren,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval opcja) 'delegate to base class m_pStockTSPB.build_indent pRow,bChildren,nTypeId,nIdObj,opcja end sub
public function create_arena(byref pRow,byref dzieci) 'delegate to base class set create_arena = m_pStockTSPB.create_arena(pRow,dzieci) end function
public function prepare_arena(byval bCointainer,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval opcja) 'delegate to base class set prepare_arena = m_pStockTSPB.prepare_arena(bCointainer,nTypeId,nIdObj,opcja) end function
public sub build_body(byref pCell,byref pDataObject) if not m_pCustomBodyBuilder is nothing then if m_pCustomBodyBuilder(pCell,pDataObject) then exit sub else m_pStockTSPB.build_body pCell,pDataObject end if end if
if not m_pCustomHLIBuilder is nothing then m_pStockTSPB.internal_build_body_ex pCell,pDataObject,true,true,"",m_pCustomHLIBuilder(nTypeId,nIdObj) exit sub end if
if m_strCustomFunction <> "" then m_pStockTSPB.internal_build_body_ex pCell,pDataObject,true,true,m_strCustomFunction,nothing exit sub end if 'delegate to base class m_pStockTSPB.build_body pCell,pDataObject end sub
public sub build_extra_cols(byref pFirstExtraCell,byref pDataObject) 'OVERWRITABLE if not m_pCustomExtraBuilder is nothing then if m_pCustomExtraBuilder(pFirstExtraCell,pDataObject) then exit sub end if end if 'delegate to base class m_pStockTSPB.build_extra_cols pFirstExtraCell,pDataObject end sub
public sub remove_children(byref pRow) 'delegate to base class m_pStockTSPB.remove_children pRow end sub
public function on_next_rs_child(byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval bGranChildren,byval opcja) 'build item dim pBodyCell : set pBodyCell = prepare_arena(bGranChildren, nTypeId,nIdObj,opcja) dim pDataObject : set pDataObject = trans_.getobj(nTypeId,nIdObj)
build_body pBodyCell,pDataObject
if extracols <> 0 then build_extra_cols pBodyCell.nextelement,pDataObject end if
on_next_rs_child = true end function
public function on_next_fixed_child(byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,byref pfFixedItem,byref pFixedCPRD) on_next_fixed_child = pfFixedItem(Me, nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,pFixedCPRD) end function end class '======================================================================= ' Tree definition ' stock implementation
' opis child-parent relationship oparty jest na statycznej tablicy budowanej ' przez "wołacza" raportu, ale mógłby być np. dynamicznie określany na podstawie ' jakiś innych kryteriów '======================================================================= class cstock_treedef private m_oCPRDArray 'as navoarray private m_id
private sub class_initialize() set m_oCPRDArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() m_id = 0 end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_oCPRDArray = nothing end sub
'-- internally used by tree services public function get_relation(byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,byref nSubPart) set get_relation = nothing
dim iter for iter = nSubPart to m_oCPRDArray.UpperIndex if m_oCPRDArray.Value(iter).Value(CPRDINX_PARENT_TYPEID) = nParentTypeId then set get_relation = m_oCPRDArray.Value(iter) nSubPart = iter + 1 exit function end if next end function
'------ public interface for raport caller -----------
'------ dodaj foldery dla całego typu parentów ------ public sub add_relation(byval nParentTypeId,byval nChildTypeId,byval strChild2ParentRefField, _ byval strChildSortField,byval strChildFilter,byval bMerge) if strChildFilter = "" then strChildFilter = "(1=1)" end if
dim pCPRD : set pCPRD = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() pCPRD.Add nParentTypeId 'CPRDINX_PARENT_TYPEID pCPRD.Add nChildTypeId 'CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID = %1 pCPRD.Add strChildSortField 'CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT = %2 pCPRD.Add strChild2ParentRefField 'CPRDINX_CHILD_2_PARENT = %5 pCPRD.Add strChildFilter 'CPRDINX_CHILD_FILTER = %7 pCPRD.Add bMerge 'CPRDINX_CHILD_MERGE m_oCPRDArray.Add pCPRD end sub
public sub add_list_relation(byval nParentTypeId,byval strListField) dim pCPRD : set pCPRD = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() pCPRD.Add nParentTypeId 'CPRDINX_PARENT_TYPEID pCPRD.Add PSEUDO_TYPEID_FIXED_LAST 'CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID = %1 pCPRD.Add getref("list_simple_text_handler") 'CPRDINX_FIXED_FUNCTION=CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT pCPRD.Add strListField 'CPRDINX_CHILD_2_PARENT = %5 m_oCPRDArray.Add pCPRD end sub
public sub add_fixed(byval nParentTypeId,byval nChildPseudoTypeId,byref pfFixedItem) dim pCPRD : set pCPRD = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() pCPRD.Add nParentTypeId 'CPRDINX_PARENT_TYPEID pCPRD.Add nChildPseudoTypeId 'CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID pCPRD.Add pfFixedItem 'CPRDINX_FIXED_FUNCTION=CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT m_oCPRDArray.Add pCPRD end sub
public sub add_fixed_simple_text(byval nParentTypeId,byval nChildPseudoTypeId,byval strText,byref pHLI) dim pCPRD : set pCPRD = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() pCPRD.Add nParentTypeId 'CPRDINX_PARENT_TYPEID pCPRD.Add nChildPseudoTypeId 'CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID pCPRD.Add getref("fixed_simple_text_handler") 'CPRDINX_FIXED_FUNCTION=CPRDINX_CHILD_SORT pCPRD.Add strText 'CPRDINX_FIXED_SIMPLE_TEXT pCPRD.Add pHLI 'CPRDINX_FIXED_SIMPLE_HLI m_oCPRDArray.Add pCPRD end sub
public property get ident() ident = m_id end property
public property let ident(byval id) m_id = id end property end class
function new_treedef(byval idUniqueId) dim pTreeDef : set pTreeDef = new cstock_treedef pTreeDef.ident = idUniqueId set new_treedef = pTreeDef end function
function new_stock_pb() set new_stock_pb = new cstock_tspb end function
function new_custombodybuilder_pb() set new_custombodybuilder_pb = new ccustombody_tspb end function
function fixed_simple_text_handler(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,byref pFixedCPRD) dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTSPD.prepare_arena(true, pFixedCPRD.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID),0,0). _ addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) pStatic.text = cstr(pFixedCPRD.Value(CPRDINX_FIXED_SIMPLE_TEXT)) set pStatic.hli = pFixedCPRD.Value(CPRDINX_FIXED_SIMPLE_HLI) fixed_simple_text_handler=true end function
function list_simple_text_handler(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,byref pFixedCPRD) dim pDataObject : set pDataObject = trans_.getobj(nParentTypeId,nParentIdObj) dim pList : set pList = pDataObject.field(pFixedCPRD.Value(CPRDINX_LIST_FIELDNAME))
dim pElementObject
for each pElementObject in pList 'build item dim nElementTypeId : nElementTypeId = pElementObject.type dim nElementIdObj : nElementIdObj = pElementObject.idobj
dim pBodyCell : set pBodyCell = pTSPD.prepare_arena(false, nElementTypeId,nElementIdObj,0)
pTSPD.build_body pBodyCell,pElementObject if pTSPD.extracols <> 0 then pTSPD.build_extra_cols pBodyCell.nextelement,pElementObject end if next list_simple_text_handler = true end function
'====================================================================== ' runtime support '====================================================================== function tsrs_im_expand_colapse(byref pPicture,byref pPB,byref pTreeDef,byval nTypeId,byval IdObj,byref pPicture1)
dim pRow :set pRow = pPicture.parent.parent pPB.remove_children pRow
'--- use stock presentation builder if pPicture.image = PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS then dim pTable : set pTable = pRow.parent.parent
pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS) pPicture.tip = "Zwiń"
pPB.init 1+pRow.userprop.prop(1),pTable,pRow.ident,pTreeDef.ident if pPicture1.tip="Zwiń wszystko" then pPicture1.image = clng(80202) pPicture1.tip = "Rozwiń wszystko" end if 'tsrs_im_expand_colapse_wszystko pPicture, pPB, pTreeDef, nTypeId, IdObj tsd_read_children pTreeDef,pPB, nTypeId,IdObj,0,0 else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS) pPicture.tip = "Rozwiń" pPB.remove_children pRow end if end function
function tsrs_im_expand_colapse_wszystko(byref pPicture,byref pPB,byref pTreeDef,byval nTypeId,byval IdObj,byref pPicture1)
dim pRow : set pRow = pPicture.parent.parent pPB.remove_children pRow
'--- use stock presentation builder if pPicture.tip = "Rozwiń wszystko" then dim pTable : set pTable = pRow.parent.parent
pPicture.image = clng(80202) pPicture.tip = "Zwiń wszystko"
pPB.init 1+pRow.userprop.prop(1),pTable,pRow.ident,pTreeDef.ident if pPicture1.tip="Zwiń" then pPicture1.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS) pPicture1.tip = "Rozwiń" end if
tsd_read_children pTreeDef,pPB, nTypeId,IdObj,1,0 else pPicture.image = clng(80202) pPicture.tip = "Rozwiń wszystko" pPB.remove_children pRow end if end function
function tsrs_im_start(byref pPB,byref pDestTable,byref pTreeDef,byval nTypeId,byval IdObj) pPB.init 0,pDestTable,-2,pTreeDef.ident tsd_read_children pTreeDef,pPB, nTypeId,IdObj,0,0 end function
#ifdef _DEBUG '====================================================================== ' TESTS '======================================================================
#define TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT 10118 #define TYPEID_N5KLIENT 10108 #define TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ 10129 #define TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK 10112 #define TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG 10114 #define TYPEID_N5ZADANIE 10119 #define TYPEID_N5POZSPRZEDAZ 10132
#include "50617"
function test tsrs_fopen() dim pPB : set pPB = new_custombodybuilder_pb() set global=pPB pPB.extracols = 4
dim pTD : set pTD = tsrs_new_explorer(pPB)
'---- twórz foldery grup, zawierające grupy pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false '---- oraz listę klientów pod tymi grupami pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","",false ' pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","%child_table%.idobj in (select pklient from n5zadanie)",false pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pKlient","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0)",false ' pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pNadZadanie","c.strTemat","",false pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.strTemat","",false
'----- twórz foldery klientów pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,"pKlient","c.strnazwisko","",false pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG,"pKlient","c.strNazwa","",false pTD.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pKlient","c.strNrdok","",false pTD.add_list_relation TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"listPozycje"
'---- oraz listę faktur dla tych klientów ' pTD.add_fixed TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,-1,getref("fixed1") ' pTD.add_fixed TYPEID_N5KLIENT,-2,getref("fixed2") pTD.add_relation -2,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pKlient","c.strNrdok","",false pTD.add_relation -3,TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG,"pKlient","c.strNazwa","",false pTD.add_relation -4,TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,"pKlient","c.strnazwisko","",false pTD.add_fixed TYPEID_N5KLIENT,-5,getref("fixed3") pTD.add_relation -5,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pKLient","c.strNrdok","",false
tsrs_start page_.ctrl(1),pTD,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,0
' tsrs_fclose() end function
function fixed1(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,pFixedCPRD) if nParentTypeId = TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT and nParentIdObj = 8 then 'build item with pTSPD .build_body .prepare_arena(true, TYPEID_N5KLIENT,55,0) end with end if fixed1=true end function
function fixed2(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,pFixedCPRD) if nParentTypeId = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then 'and nParentIdObj = 55 then 'build item with pTSPD dim pCell set pCell = .prepare_arena(false, -2,nParentIdObj,0) pCell.backcolor=rgb(255,0,0)
set pCell = .prepare_arena(true, -3,nParentIdObj,0) pCell.backcolor=rgb(0,255,0)
set pCell = .prepare_arena(true, -4,nParentIdObj,0) pCell.backcolor=rgb(0,0,255) end with end if fixed2=true end function
function fixed3(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,pFixedCPRD) pTSPD.prepare_arena(true, pFixedCPRD.Value(CPRDINX_CHILD_TYPEID),nParentIdObj,0). _ addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = "f-ry" fixed3=true end function
#endif
